name: The Gate Of Mystical Realm
overview: In a world where warriors are respected, Shi Mu's fate seems destined to be unique. As a adopted son of aristocratic families, he was forced to embark on the path of a warrior who searched for the truth and self-salvation. From the competition between the four museums of Fengcheng to the battle between sects, interests are involved and strong enemies are surrounded by them. Every challenge makes Shi Mu more determined. In the end, Shi Mu realized his bloodline power, which not only changed his destiny, but also affected the future of many people.
